overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding school adventure game, showing a student character exploring gothic castle interiors including spiral staircases, portrait galleries, and classrooms with detailed wood paneling and magical artifacts.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden spiral staircase with blue paneled walls

agents.ego_description: walking up a spiral wooden staircase following an older figure in dark robes

notable_agents.action: older person in dark robes ascending the stairs ahead

dark blue painted wooden wall panels with decorative trim
ornate wall-mounted lanterns with warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow spiral staircase with dark wooden steps and blue paneled walls, following an NPC in dark robes. Warm light from wall sconces illuminates the tight enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor with tall arched windows

events.description: exits spiral staircase through arched doorway into bright stone corridor with tall windows

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the NPC through a sunlit stone corridor with tall windows

notable_agents.action: companion in dark robes walking alongside through the corridor

entered.detail: light-colored stone block walls with tall arched windows letting in natural light
large arched wooden doorway with stone frame leading to next area

segments.scene_description: The character exits the spiral staircase into a brighter stone corridor with tall arched windows. Natural light mixes with wall sconces as the character walks alongside the NPC companion toward the next doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular portrait gallery with blue walls

events.description: enters circular portrait room with numerous framed paintings on blue walls

agents.ego_description: entering a grand circular room filled with portraits and crossing toward the far exit

notable_agents.action: figure in dark robes walking ahead toward the far archway

entered.detail: circular room with blue walls covered in framed portraits and paintings
intricate circular rug or floor design with blue and gold patterns
large potted shrub in a blue and white ceramic pot

segments.scene_description: The character enters a circular portrait gallery with blue walls covered in framed paintings. The space opens up with a decorative circular floor pattern and potted plants as the character crosses toward the exit archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with dark wood paneling and large statue

events.description: exits portrait gallery into long grand hall with dark wood paneling
approaches and passes large bronze statue of robed figure

agents.ego_description: walking through a grand hall passing students in robes and approaching a large statue

group of students gathered near the large statue

entered.detail: tall dark wood paneled walls with gothic arches and decorative trim
tall bronze statue of robed figure holding a scroll on circular pedestal
large wall panel with gold text inscriptions listing names

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand hall with dark wood paneling and high ceilings, passing students in school robes. The character approaches and passes a large bronze statue of a robed figure, with inscribed wall panels visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: classroom with wooden desks and teacher's podium

events.description: enters classroom through large wooden doors
stops at cabinet with chalkboard diagrams to examine it

agents.ego_description: exploring the classroom, walking between desks and approaching the front teaching area

entered.detail: rows of wooden student desks and benches arranged in the hall
large wooden teacher's desk with magical artifacts and books
wooden cabinet with three chalkboard panels showing astronomical diagrams
tall gothic windows with multiple panes letting in natural light

segments.scene_description: The character enters a classroom filled with wooden desks and approaches the front teaching area. The room features tall gothic windows, chandeliers, and a large cabinet with chalkboard diagrams. The character stops to examine the cabinet with astronomical drawings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a spiral staircase into the expansive, scholarly atmosphere of a grand classroom. It begins by ascending narrow wooden steps between blue paneled walls, following a robed figure under the warm glow of wall sconces. As the character exits the stairs, the space opens into a bright stone corridor with tall arched windows before shifting into a circular portrait gallery adorned with framed paintings and decorative flooring. The scene then expands further into a grand hall of dark wood paneling and high ceilings, passing students and a large bronze statue before turning toward a final doorway. Finally, the camera enters a gothic classroom filled with wooden desks and chandeliers, coming to a stop before a large cabinet covered in astronomical chalkboard diagrams.
